_comment: Hand-curated list of upstream Claude Code plugin / plugin-marketplace repositories. Sync scripts (scripts/sync_skills.py, scripts/sync_mcp.py, scripts/sync_skills_sh.py, scripts/sync_mcp_registry.py, scripts/sync_windsurfrules.py) read this file to skip individual skill / MCP entries that come bundled inside a plugin, so the plugin appears once in the catalog (category=plugins) instead of being shredded into many separate per-skill / per-mcp entries. URLs MUST be canonical GitHub repo URLs with no trailing slash. The optional `plugins` array (consumed by scripts/sync_plugins_official.py + scripts/sync_plugins_dev.py) further collapses individual plugin marketplace entries when a higher-authority canonical entry already exists (e.g. anthropic-curated superpowers vs obra/superpowers-marketplace). Match keys are `(source, plugin_name)` case-insensitive. See openspec/changes/add-plugins-category/specs/plugin-bundle-dedup/spec.md for the contract.
